# pii_govid_eu corpus. Synthetic invalid placeholders only.

# === UK & Ireland ===
# expect: UK NINO
AB123456C
# expect: UK NHS Number (labeled)
NHS: 943 476 5919
# expect: Ireland PPSN
1234567FA
# expect: Ireland Eircode
D02 X285

# === France ===
# expect: France NIR (labeled)
NIR: 185037511600123

# === Germany ===
# expect: Germany Steuer-ID (labeled)
Steuer-ID: 12345678901
# expect: Germany Steuernummer
21/815/08150

# === Italy ===
# expect: Italy Codice Fiscale
MRTMTT91D08F205J
# expect: Italy Partita IVA (labeled)
Partita IVA: IT12345678901
# expect: Italy Passport
YA1234567

# === Spain ===
# expect: Spain DNI/NIE (labeled)
DNI: 12345678Z
DNI: X1234567L
# expect: Spain NIE
X1234567L
# expect: Spain NIF (business)
A58818501
# expect: Spain SSN
28/12345678/90

# === Netherlands & Belgium ===
# expect: Netherlands BSN (labeled)
BSN: 111222333
# expect: Belgium Rijksregisternummer
85.07.30-033.28

# === Nordic ===
# expect: Sweden Personnummer
811228-9874
# expect: Finland HETU
131052-308T

# === Baltics & Central / Eastern Europe ===
# Estonia/Czech/Romania are checksum-gated (Block 6d); values are
# synthetic but ISO/national check-digit valid.
# expect: Estonia Isikukood
37605030299
# expect: Poland PESEL (labeled)
PESEL: 02070803628
# expect: Czech/Slovak Rodne cislo
900101/1239
# expect: Romania CNP
1800101221144
# expect: Russia SNILS
112-233-445 95

# === EU national IDs, label+checksum gated (Block 6a) ===
# expect: Poland PESEL (labeled)
# expect: Netherlands BSN (labeled)
# expect: Belgium Rijksregisternummer (labeled)
# expect: France NIR (labeled)
PESEL: 44051401359
BSN: 123456782
RRN: 93051822361
NIR 1 84 01 76 451 089 64
